data.body: 97f2 RED evidence: (1) test_backend_neutrality.py::test_scalar_core_imports_no_jira_adapter -> 4 FAILED on assertion (fetcher/applier/apply_handlers/_attestation still import adapters.jira/acli_subprocess). (2) test_backend_scalar_surface.py + test_apply_handlers_neutral_assignee.py -> ImportError (BackendEnvError/BackendAssigneeNotFoundError absent = real absence of new port API). Oracle authored: happy(project DIG-default, query_project configured, assert_env_ready passes) + heldout(query_project undefaulted fail-closed, assert_env_ready raises BackendEnvError naming missing, BackendEnvError is RuntimeError, jira AssigneeNotFoundError subclasses neutral base+ValueError, JiraBackend isinstance Backend, apply_handlers soft-fails neutral base, AST neutrality gate). Reference: Gerrit 920 scalar subset (worktree impl-4af8-differ-di), DROP field/link helpers.
